have h1 : ∀ i, ∀ ω, ‖(X (τ i) ω)‖ ≤ ‖(X n)‖ := by
    intro i ω
    have h2 : τ i ω ≤ (n : ι) := by
      simpa using hτ_le i ω
    have h3 : ‖(X (τ i) ω)‖ ≤ ‖(X n)‖ := by
      have h4 : X (τ i) ω ≤ X n := by
        apply hX.le_of_le
        exact_mod_cast h2
      have h5 : ‖(X (τ i) ω)‖ ≤ ‖(X n)‖ := by
        apply norm_le_norm
        linarith
      exact h5
    exact h3
  have h4 : ∀ i, IsLp (fun ω ↦ X (τ i) ω) 1 μ := by
    intro i
    have h7 : IsLp (fun ω ↦ X (τ i) ω) 1 μ := by
      apply isLp_of_memLp
      apply memLp_one_iff_integrable.mpr
      apply hX.isIntegrable
    exact h7
  have h5 : IsLp (fun ω ↦ ‖X n ω‖) 1 μ := by
    apply isLp_of_memLp
    apply memLp_one_iff_integrable.mpr
    have h7 : IsIntegrable (X n) μ := by
      apply hX.isIntegrable
    simpa using h7
  have h7 : ∀ i, ∃ j, ∀ ω, ‖(X (τ i) ω)‖ ≤ ‖(X n)‖ := by
    intro i
    use n
    intro ω
    have h8 : ‖(X (τ i) ω)‖ ≤ ‖(X n)‖ := h1 i ω
    simpa using h8
  apply uniformIntegrable_of_dominated_singleton (by norm_num) (h5) (fun i ↦ by simpa using h4 i) (fun i ↦ h7 i)

open scoped NNReal ENNReal
open Filter

namespace MeasureTheory

variable {ι κ Ω E F : Type*} {mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω} {μ : Measure Ω}

lemma UniformIntegrable.add [NormedAddCommGroup E] {X Y : ι → Ω → E} {p : ℝ≥0∞} (hp : 1 ≤ p)
    (hX : UniformIntegrable X p μ) (hY : UniformIntegrable Y p μ) :
    UniformIntegrable (X + Y) p μ := by
  refine ⟨fun _ ↦ (hX.1 _).add (hY.1 _), ?_, ?_⟩
  · rcases hX with ⟨hX₁, hX₂, hX₃⟩
    rcases hY with ⟨hY₁, hY₂, hY₃⟩
    exact hX₂.add hY₂ hp hX₁ hY₁
  · obtain ⟨C_X, hC_X⟩ := hX.2.2
    obtain ⟨C_Y, hC_Y⟩ := hY.2.2
    exact ⟨C_X + C_Y,
      fun i ↦ le_trans (eLpNorm_add_le (hX.1 i) (hY.1 i) hp) (add_le_add (hC_X i) (hC_Y i))⟩

lemma uniformIntegrable_of_dominated [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedAddCommGroup F]
    {X : ι → Ω → E} {Y : κ → Ω → F} {p : ℝ≥0∞}
    (hY : UniformIntegrable Y p μ) (mX : ∀ i, AEStronglyMeasurable (X i) μ)
    (hX : ∀ i, ∃ j, ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ‖X i ω‖ ≤ ‖Y j ω‖) :
    UniformIntegrable X p μ := by
  refine ⟨mX, fun ε hε ↦ ?_, ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨δ, hδ, h⟩ := hY.2.1 hε
    refine ⟨δ, hδ, fun i s hs hμs ↦ let ⟨j, hj⟩ := hX i
      le_trans (eLpNorm_mono_ae ?_) <| h j s hs hμs⟩
    filter_upwards [hj] with ω hω
    rw [Set.indicator]
    split_ifs with hmem
    · rw [Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
      exact hω
    · simp [Set.indicator_of_notMem hmem]
  · obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := hY.2.2
    exact ⟨C, fun i ↦ let ⟨j, hj⟩ := hX i
      le_trans (eLpNorm_mono_ae hj) <| hC j⟩

lemma UniformIntegrable.norm [NormedAddCommGroup E] {X : ι → Ω → E} {p : ℝ≥0∞}
    (hY : UniformIntegrable X p μ) :
    UniformIntegrable (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) p μ := by
  refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated hY ?_ (fun i ↦ ⟨i, by simp⟩)
  exact fun i ↦ (UniformIntegrable.aestronglyMeasurable hY i).norm

lemma uniformIntegrable_iff_norm [NormedAddCommGroup E] {X : ι → Ω → E} {p : ℝ≥0∞}
    (mX : ∀ i, AEStronglyMeasurable (X i) μ) :
    UniformIntegrable X p μ ↔ UniformIntegrable (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) p μ := by
  refine ⟨UniformIntegrable.norm, fun hNorm ↦ uniformIntegrable_of_dominated hNorm mX ?_⟩
  exact fun i ↦ ⟨i, by simp⟩

lemma uniformIntegrable_of_dominated_singleton [NormedAddCommGroup E] {X : ι → Ω → E} {Y : Ω → ℝ}
    {p : ℝ≥0∞} (hp : 1 ≤ p) (hp_ne_top : p ≠ ∞) (hY : MemLp Y p μ)
    (mX : ∀ i, AEStronglyMeasurable (X i) μ) (hX : ∀ i, ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ‖X i ω‖ ≤ Y ω) :
    UniformIntegrable X p μ :=
  uniformIntegrable_of_dominated (κ := ι) (uniformIntegrable_const hp hp_ne_top hY) mX
    <| fun i ↦ ⟨i, by filter_upwards [hX i] with ω hω using hω.trans <| Real.le_norm_self _⟩

lemma UniformIntegrable.condExp' {X : ι → Ω → E} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace ℝ E]
    [CompleteSpace E] [IsFiniteMeasure μ] (hX : UniformIntegrable X 1 μ)
    {𝓕 : κ → MeasurableSpace Ω} (h𝓕 : ∀ i, 𝓕 i ≤ mΩ) :
    UniformIntegrable (fun (p : ι × κ) ↦ μ[X p.1 | 𝓕 p.2]) 1 μ := by
  have hX' := hX
  obtain ⟨hX1, hX2, ⟨C, hC⟩⟩ := hX
  refine ⟨fun p ↦ (stronglyMeasurable_condExp.mono (h𝓕 p.2)).aestronglyMeasurable, ?_,
    ⟨C, fun p ↦ (eLpNorm_condExp_le_eLpNorm le_rfl (X p.1)).trans (hC p.1)⟩⟩
  refine unifIntegrable_of le_rfl (by simp)
    (fun p ↦ (stronglyMeasurable_condExp.mono (h𝓕 p.2)).aestronglyMeasurable) fun ε hε ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨δ, δ_pos, hδ⟩ := hX2 hε
  lift δ to ℝ≥0 using δ_pos.le
  have hδ' : δ ≠ 0 := by
    convert δ_pos.ne'
    simp
  refine ⟨(⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 1 μ).toNNReal / δ + 1, fun p ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [eLpNorm_congr_ae (condExp_indicator ?_ ?_).symm]
  rotate_left
  · exact memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (hX'.memLp p.1)
  · exact stronglyMeasurable_const.measurableSet_le stronglyMeasurable_condExp.nnnorm
  grw [eLpNorm_condExp_le_eLpNorm le_rfl, hδ]
  · exact stronglyMeasurable_const.measurableSet_le <|
      stronglyMeasurable_condExp.mono (h𝓕 p.2) |>.nnnorm
  calc
  _ ≤ eLpNorm μ[X p.1 | 𝓕 p.2] 1 μ / ((⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 1 μ).toNNReal / δ + 1) := by
    simp_rw [← ENNReal.coe_le_coe, ← enorm_eq_nnnorm]
    grw [meas_ge_le_lintegral_div (by fun_prop) (by simp) (by simp),
      ← eLpNorm_one_eq_lintegral_enorm]
    norm_cast
  _ ≤ eLpNorm μ[X p.1 | 𝓕 p.2] 1 μ / ((⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 1 μ) / δ) := by
    grw [ENNReal.coe_toNNReal (ne_top_of_le_ne_top (by simp) <| iSup_le hC),
      ENNReal.div_le_div_left (a := (⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 1 μ) / δ)]
    simp
  _ = eLpNorm μ[X p.1 | 𝓕 p.2] 1 μ / (⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 1 μ) * δ := by
    rw [← ENNReal.div_mul _ (Or.inr <| ENNReal.coe_ne_zero.2 hδ') (by simp)]
  _ ≤ 1 * δ := by
    grw [eLpNorm_condExp_le_eLpNorm le_rfl]
    gcongr
    exact ENNReal.div_le_one_of_le <| le_iSup (α := ℝ≥0∞) _ p.1
  _ = _ := by simp

lemma UnifIntegrable.comp {κ : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E]
    {X : ι → Ω → E} {p : ℝ≥0∞} (hX : UnifIntegrable X p μ) (f : κ → ι) :
    UnifIntegrable (X ∘ f) p μ := by
  intro ε hε
  obtain ⟨δ, hδ, h⟩ := hX hε
  exact ⟨δ, ⟨hδ, fun i ↦ h (f i)⟩⟩

lemma UniformIntegrable.comp {κ : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E]
    {X : ι → Ω → E} {p : ℝ≥0∞} (hX : UniformIntegrable X p μ) (f : κ → ι) :
    UniformIntegrable (X ∘ f) p μ := by
  obtain ⟨hX1, hX2, ⟨C, hC⟩⟩ := hX
  exact ⟨fun _ ↦ hX1 _, hX2.comp f, ⟨C, fun i ↦ hC (f i)⟩⟩

lemma UniformIntegrable.condExp {X : ι → Ω → E} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace ℝ E]
    [CompleteSpace E] [IsFiniteMeasure μ] (hX : UniformIntegrable X 1 μ) {𝓕 : ι → MeasurableSpace Ω}
    (h𝓕 : ∀ i, 𝓕 i ≤ mΩ) :
    UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ μ[X i | 𝓕 i]) 1 μ :=
  (hX.condExp' h𝓕).comp (fun i ↦ (i, i))

variable {ι : Type*} [LinearOrder ι] [OrderBot ι] [Countable ι] [TopologicalSpace ι]
  [OrderTopology ι] [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace ℝ E]
  [CompleteSpace E] {𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ} [SigmaFiniteFiltration μ 𝓕]

lemma Martingale.ae_eq_condExp_of_isStoppingTime {X : ι → Ω → E}
    (hX : Martingale X 𝓕 μ) {τ : Ω → WithTop ι} (hτ : IsStoppingTime 𝓕 τ) {n : ι}
    (hτ_le : ∀ ω, τ ω ≤ n) :
    stoppedValue X τ =ᵐ[μ] μ[X n | hτ.measurableSpace] :=

have h1 : ∀ i, τ i ≤ n := by
    intro i
    intro ω
    exact hτ_le i ω
  have h2 : ∀ i, stoppedValue X (τ i) = X (τ i) := by
    intro i
    simp [stoppedValue]
  have h3 : ∀ i, IsMeasurable (fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) := by
    intro i
    simp [h2, IsMeasurable]
  have h4 : ∀ i, Integrable (fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) := by
    intro i
    have h5 : τ i ≤ n := h1 i
    have h6 : IsMeasurable (fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) := h3 i
    have h7 : IsMeasurable (fun ω => X (τ i) ω) := by
      simp [IsMeasurable]
    have h8 : Integrable (fun ω => X (τ i) ω) := by
      apply hX.integrable
    have h9 : Integrable (fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) := by
      simp [h2 i]
      all_goals
        try { exact h8 }
    exact h9
  have h5 : ∀ i, L1Norm (fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) ≤ L1Norm (fun ω => X n ω) := by
    intro i
    have h6 : τ i ≤ n := h1 i
    have h7 : L1Norm (fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) ≤ L1Norm (fun ω => X n ω) := by
      have h8 : stoppedValue X (τ i) = fun ω => X (τ i) ω := by
        funext ω
        simp [h2 i]
      rw [h8]
      have h9 : τ i ≤ n := h6
      have h10 : L1Norm (fun ω => X (τ i) ω) ≤ L1Norm (fun ω => X n ω) := by
        have h11 : IsMeasurable (fun ω => X (τ i) ω) := by
          simp [IsMeasurable]
        have h12 : IsMeasurable (fun ω => X n ω) := by
          simp [IsMeasurable]
        have h13 : Integrable (fun ω => X (τ i) ω) := by
          apply hX.integrable
        have h14 : Integrable (fun ω => X n ω) := by
          apply hX.integrable
        have h15 : (fun ω => X (τ i) ω) ≤ (fun ω => X n ω) := by
          apply hX.submartingaleOn
          all_goals
            try { 
              simp at *
              all_goals
                try { tauto }
            }
          all_goals
            try { 
              simp at *
              all_goals
                try { 
                  have h16 : τ i ≤ n := h9
                  exact h16
                }
            }
        have h16 : L1Norm (fun ω => X (τ i) ω) ≤ L1Norm (fun ω => X n ω) := by
          apply L1Norm.le_of_le
          apply h15
        exact h16
      exact h10
    exact h7
  have h6 : ∃ A, μ A < ε ∧ ∀ i, ∫ (x : Ω) in Aᶜ, |(fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) x| dμ < ε := by
    have h7 : ∃ A_n, μ A_n < ε / 2 ∧ ∫ (x : Ω) in A_nᶜ, |(fun ω => X n ω) x| dμ < ε / 2 := by
      have h8 : Integrable (fun ω => X n ω) := by
        apply hX.integrable
      have h9 : ∃ A_n, μ A_n < ε / 2 ∧ ∫ (x : Ω) in A_nᶜ, |(fun ω => X n ω) x| dμ < ε / 2 := by
        apply h8.exists_set_of_norm_lt
        all_goals
          try { linarith }
      exact h9
    rcases h7 with ⟨A_n, hA_n1, hA_n2⟩
    use A_n
    constructor
    · -- Show that μ A < ε
      linarith
    · -- Show that ∀ i, ∫ (x : Ω) in Aᶜ, |(fun ω => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) x| dμ < ε
      intro i
      have h8 : L1Norm (fun (ω : Ω) => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) ≤ L1Norm (fun (ω : Ω) => X n ω) := by
        apply h5 i
      have h9 : ∫ (x : Ω) in A_nᶜ, |(fun (ω : Ω) => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) x| dμ < ε := by
        have h10 : ∫ (x : Ω) in A_nᶜ, |(fun (ω : Ω) => stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) x| dμ ≤ ∫ (x : Ω) in A_nᶜ, |(fun (ω : Ω) => X n ω) x| dμ := by
          apply Integral.norm_le_norm
          apply h8
        linarith
      exact h9
  exact h6

# Solving the Submartingale Stopped Value Problem in Lean 4

We need to prove that for a submartingale $X$ and a sequence of stopping times $\tau_i$, the stopped values $X_{\tau_i}$ form a uniformly integrable sequence.

Let's think about how to approach this. For a submartingale $X$, we have $E[X_n \mid \mathcal{F}_m] \leq X_m$ for $n \geq m$. When we stop the process at time $\tau_i$, we get $X_{\tau_i}$. The key insight is that the stopped process $X_{\tau_i}$ is a martingale with respect to the stopping time $\tau_i$.

To prove uniform integrability, we need to show that for any $\varepsilon > 0$, there exists a set $A$ with $\mu(A) < \varepsilon$ such that $|X_{\tau_i}(\omega)| < \varepsilon$ for all $\omega \notin A$. 

For submartingales, we know that $E[X_n] \to E[X_\infty]$ as $n \to \infty$ if $X_n \to X_\infty$ almost surely. The stopped values $X_{\tau_i}$ will also converge to $X_\infty$ almost surely, and thus will have the same expectation.

The key property we'll use is that for a submartingale, the stopped values form a martingale. This means that $E[X_{\tau_i}] = E[X_{\tau_j}]$ for all $i, j$ when $\tau_i, \tau_j$ are bounded by some $n$.

We need to prove that for a submartingale $X$ and a sequence of stopping times $\tau_i$, the stopped values $X_{\tau_i}$ form a uniformly integrable sequence.

The key insight is that the stopped process $X_{\tau_i}$ is a martingale with respect to the stopping time $\tau_i$.

To prove uniform integrability, we need to show that for any $\varepsilon > 0$, there exists a set $A$ with $\mu(A) < \varepsilon$ such that $|X_{\tau_i}(\omega)| < \varepsilon$ for all $\omega \notin A$. 

For submartingales, we know that $E[X_n] \to E[X_\infty]$ as $n \to \infty$ if $X_n \to X_\infty$ almost surely. The stopped values $X_{\tau_i}$ will also converge to $X_\infty$ almost surely, and thus will have the same expectation.

The key property we'll use is that for a submartingale, the stopped values form a martingale. This means that $E[X_{\tau_i}] = E[X_{\tau_j}]$ for all $i, j$ when $\tau_i, \tau_j$ are bounded by some $n$.
